title: canarium salomonense subsp. salomonense
intro: Canarium salomonense subsp. salomonense, also known as the Salomon Canarium, is a species of tree found in the Solomon Islands, belonging to the family Burseraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Canarium salomonense subsp. salomonense include its potential in treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or ingested under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
